title: Brentwood Spring Music Festival
description: A vibrant celebration of local and regional artists performing live music across multiple stages. Join us for an unforgettable day of great music, food vendors, and community connection.

title: Community Farmers Market
description: Fresh local produce, artisan goods, and handmade crafts from Brentwood farmers and makers. Every Saturday morning to support local agriculture and small businesses.

title: Youth Soccer League Finals
description: Championship matches of the Brentwood Youth Soccer League. Watch talented young athletes compete at the highest level. Family-friendly atmosphere with snacks and parking available.

title: Downtown Art Walk & Gallery Night
description: Explore local galleries, street art installations, and pop-up exhibitions. Live performances, artist talks, and light refreshments throughout downtown. Celebrate Brentwood's vibrant creative community.

title: Family Fun Day at Heritage Park
description: Interactive games, face painting, petting zoo, and activities for all ages. Picnic-friendly with food trucks and lawn games. Perfect weekend outing for families.

title: Brentwood Business Networking Breakfast
description: Connect with local entrepreneurs, business owners, and community leaders. Breakfast, keynote speaker, and structured networking sessions to grow your professional network.

title: Open Air Cinema: Classic Movie Night
description: Enjoy outdoor movie screening under the stars. Bring blankets and pillows for a cozy evening. Concessions available. This month: A classic feel-good film.

title: Hiking Trail Grand Opening - Oak Ridge Trail
description: Join us for the official opening of Brentwood's newest hiking trail. Guided nature walk, ranger talks about local flora and fauna, and refreshments at the trailhead.
